scenario_results.name: Edge topology and control-plane placement
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves topology comparison, control-plane placement, local autonomy, connectivity, failure-domain, source, assumption, and tradeoff handling.

scenario_results.name: Provider-specific remote industrial cell
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves the pack does not collapse into generic edge advice and handles provider-specific operating modes, artifact maps, and evidence prerequisites.

scenario_results.name: Intermittent connectivity and state synchronization
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves degraded-mode admission control, queueing, conflict detection, source-of-truth precedence, and application-boundary preservation.

scenario_results.name: Minimal observability during link loss
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves local telemetry, stale-metric caveats, alert escalation, evidence capture, and low-confidence observability behavior.

scenario_results.name: Remote-site disaster recovery and restore validation
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves DR design, RTO/RPO feasibility testing, restore sequence, backup evidence, failback checks, and escalation when objectives conflict with link behavior.

scenario_results.name: Phased remote-site rollout and rollback
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves canary waves, blast-radius gates, rollback criteria, registry readiness, maintenance evidence, non-execution boundary, and deployment output fidelity.

scenario_results.name: Connectivity regression triage
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves ordered infrastructure troubleshooting, reversible mitigation, DNS/routing/service-link evidence, telecom handoff, and uncertainty handling.

scenario_results.name: Cost, reliability, and isolation tradeoff
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves cost, reliability, isolation, latency, staffing, retention, recovery, and approval-boundary tradeoff handling.

scenario_results.name: Capacity and saturation response
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves saturation thresholds, queue policy, node-pressure evidence, pre-scaling, shedding, validation, and Kubernetes implementation handoff.

scenario_results.name: Post-failure state drift stabilization
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves unsafe rollout freeze, authoritative state selection, Terraform state awareness, drift recovery sequencing, and IaC specialist handoff.

scenario_results.name: Application code design refusal
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves explicit rejection of application code, database implementation, and API design while preserving infrastructure context for handoff.

scenario_results.name: Telecom procurement refusal
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves refusal of carrier selection, circuit procurement, and SLA negotiation with a limited infrastructure requirements handoff.

scenario_results.name: IAM, legal, and compliance authority refusal
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves refusal of primary IAM design, legal interpretation, compliance certification, procurement decisions, and unauthorized signoff.

scenario_results.name: Help-desk and single-device support refusal
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves refusal of hands-on incident execution, single-device support, hardware repair, and ticket closure authority.

scenario_results.name: Low-confidence missing-facts escalation
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves missing-facts matrix, final recommendation refusal, retrieval dependencies, and orchestrator return when site facts are absent.

scenario_results.name: Industry name cannot be cosmetic
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves refusal of generic cross-industry edge advice without provider-specific records, systems, evidence, authority constraints, or operating mode.

scenario_results.name: Conflicting source or tenant policy
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves escalation instead of confident synthesis when provider guidance and tenant policy conflict without approved source precedence.

scenario_results.name: Tenant adaptation with public baseline preserved
scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves tenant-specific adaptation that preserves public baseline, isolates overrides, records assumptions, and constrains rollback guidance.

notes: All 18 refreshed scenarios passed against the standard validation profile.

Scenario coverage includes core architecture guidance, operations and troubleshooting, resilience and failure scenarios, cost/reliability/isolation tradeoffs, output fidelity, boundary refusal, low-confidence escalation, provider-specific evidence gaps, conflicting-policy handling, tenant adaptation, no unreviewed regressions, and commercialization readiness.
The refreshed spec pack supersedes the previous built-era package baseline as source of truth and keeps runtime posture at specification-based without claiming retained implementation ownership.
